issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause

router.reasoning: The ticket is about pausing a subscription, which is a billing-related issue, and the stated company matches the issue content.

queries: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.

generator.response: To pause your subscription, please follow these steps: Access Subscription Settings by clicking on the profile icon in the top-right corner of the page and selecting Settings from the dropdown menu. Navigate to the Billing section under Subscription. Initiate Pause Subscription by clicking the Cancel Plan button and selecting the desired pause duration. Confirm Pause by clicking Confirm Pause. Please note that you must have an active subscription that started at least 30 days ago and a monthly subscription for one of the following plans: Individual Monthly - Basic or Interview Monthly.
generator.justification: Based on the documentation article 'Pause Subscription -- How to Pause Your Subscription' and 'Pause Subscription -- Prerequisites'.

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update

router.reasoning: The ticket is about updating a certificate name, which is a general inquiry related to HackerRank's product.

queries: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it

generator.response: You can update the name on your certificate only once per account. When you update your name, the change applies to all your certificates. After you update it, you cannot change it again. To update the name on your certificate, follow these steps: Open your certificate page, enter the new name in the Full Name field, click Regenerate Certificate, and then click Update Name in the confirmation dialog.
generator.justification: Document 1: Certifications FAQs, section 'Can I update the name on my certificate?'

generator.response: Claude's training data is updated periodically, but each model has a knowledge cutoff date. For example, Claude Opus 4.7 was trained on data up until January 2026. This means that if you ask about events or information that occurred after January 2026, the model may not have accurate information. You can refer to the Models overview in our Claude Docs for more detailed information about our models.
